channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: WOO³
item.description: A modpack that contains custom content and server tweaks for the Whispers of Oldwood season 3.

item.title: Downed
item.description: Replaces the vanilla downed state with a survivable, invulnerable downed state. Quite bloody.

item.title: PlayerCollisions
item.description: Adds player collision box repulsion.

item.title: Seraphs Ledger
item.description: A personal bundle of small quality-of-life tweaks for Vintage Story.

item.title: Caeloria: Content
item.description: Content pack for Caeloria: Reborn. Doesn't include any code mods, those are different mods.

item.title: Vanilla+ classes
item.description: A small mod, reshuffling class traits and roles, and equalising their usefulness for multiplayer.

item.title: WOO Presents: Fantasy Crops
item.description: Fantasy Crops catered to play on the Whispers of Oldwood, available for all.

item.title: Vintage Kinematics
item.description: Rotation networks, belts, crushers, and automation for Vintage Story

item.title: Player Model lib
item.description: Library for adding new player races

item.title: Salty´s Clear View
item.description: Fades blocks blocking the third person camera!

item.title: Entity Resync Fix Resynced
item.description: Mitigates client-side entity desync: frozen mobs, floating drops and duplicate ghost players.

item.title: LowHealthSlowdown
item.description: Slows the player down up to 30% when under 30% HP

item.title: Riley's Classes [ALPHA]
item.description: Addon for Aldi's Classes, makes classes interact with other mods and adds new ones!

item.title: Solid Long Tables
item.description: Makes certain 2x1 clutter tables solid multiblocks.

item.title: Server Tweak
item.description: Small tweak made for a closed server, DO NOT USE

item.title: CB Patches
item.description: JSON content patches for my small personal server

item.title: CB Harmony Patches
item.description: Harmony patches for my personal server.

item.title: JSCM Frozen Struggles
item.description: A new modpack for my girlfriend and I. Focused around a Sub-Artic playthrough

item.title: Oils! Resoaped
item.description: Oils! Resoaped. A content mod that adds plant oils & their uses as well as some alternative recipes.

item.title: Navi
item.description: A glowing fairy who lives in your pendant: light source, enemy alert, nameable and recolorable.

item.title: Laboror's machete
item.description: This mods add 2 machetes, a tool and a weapon (a machete and a broad machete)

item.title: Immersive Rainbow
item.description: Adds a simple physically accurate (as much as possible) rainbow

item.title: Rolling Saves
item.description: Quietly keeps 3 cold copies of every world. Meta-mod — no in-game UI. Restore by hand.

item.title: CollapseStory
item.description: Adds structural and material physics to building blocks, and greatly expands beam functionality.

item.title: KRPG Enchantment
item.description: Adds MC-like enchantment system to VS.

item.title: Mod-Auto Installer
item.description: An applicaiton that allows you to mass-install mods based on a logfile!

item.title: ReelMower
item.description: Push reel mower. Cut grass, Multiplayer in testing

item.title: Bed Regen Regenerated
item.description: Regenerate health faster while lying in a bed (multiplayer friendly).

item.title: Searchable
item.description: Adds a command that allows you to look through other players' inventories (with consent)

item.title: Storage Lectern
item.description: A tiered storage lectern that links multiple inventories
